<!-- Workspace-specific instructions for the portfolio Next.js project -->

## Project Overview
- Next.js portfolio website for harmanjeet.com
- Deployed on GitHub Pages
- Tech Stack: TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Next.js

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all components
- Follow responsive design principles
- Maintain clean, semantic HTML structure
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling

## Deployment
- Target: GitHub Pages (static export)
- Build output: `out/` directory
- Branch: `gh-pages` for deployment
